steps.title: Track the two methods
steps.content: Seismic monitoring narrows down roughly where an impact happened, then orbital imaging examines that limited area to locate the crater precisely. Each method does a different part of the work.

steps.title: Name the relationship
steps.content: A would mean the methods duplicate each other. B would mean they cover everything. D would mean either method could replace the other. The relationship is that they work together. The answer is C.
